rationale: deacon resolves `extends` eagerly, so `read-configuration --include-merged-configuration` produces a full merged config (image=base:bookworm, containerEnv={CHILD,BASE}, forwardPorts=[3000,4000]); the reference CLI v0.87.0 does NOT resolve extends and errors (exit 1, empty stdout: 'No image information specified'). This is a deliberate ahead-of-spec deacon capability, not a regression -- do not 'fix' by dropping extends support. Characterized in fixtures/parity-corpus/REPORT.md ('extends-child: deacon resolves extends at up/merged; reference errors'), docs/DIFFERENTIATORS.md, and DevContainerConfig::extends field docs (issue #297). Inverse of the sibling errors/extends-missing deacon-stricter waiver.
